title: paspalum dasypleurum
intro: Paspalum dasypleurum, also known as Paspalum, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Paspalum dasypleurum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Paspalum dasypleurum are typically made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
